reviews.comment:
Justo entramos en el cambio de turno. 21.43hs. Tenian unos conos bloqueando los surtidores. Le pedí por favor que me cargue diésel. Me dijo que tenía que esperar. El empleado se paseaba sin tapabocas, no tenía identificación de nombre. Una vergüenza para el ACA esta atención. El empleado que ingresaba me atendió correctamente a los 10 minutos aproximadamente luego de hacer saber que realizaría el informe.

(Translated by Google)
We walked in right as the shift change was at 9:43 PM. They had cones blocking the pumps. I politely asked them to fill my tank with diesel. They told me I'd have to wait. The employee was walking around without a mask and didn't have any name tags. This service is a disgrace to the ACA. The next employee came in and helped me properly about 10 minutes later after I explained I would file a report.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM2b1l5QnFRRRAB
